text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today's my day off. While strolling near the student dormitories, I
catch a glimpse of a familiar face.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Hey Trainer, whatcha doin'?
choice_data_list: Just taking a walk. What about you?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Eh, not much goin' on—just killing time. Can't help but feel restless on
my days off.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Oh hey, I got an idea! You know what would be fun? Bikes!
choice_data_list: You wanna go on a road trip?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Hell yeah! ...is what I'd like to say, but I don't actually own a
motorbike myself... or proper protection for that matter.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Whiiich is why we're going to a motorbike shop! C'mon, let's go check
out the new models!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Whooooa! Trainer, check this out! It's the UMAHA ZX750.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Would ya look at the size of that tank! And despite the bulk, such a
streamlined, modern body design! Oh man, as soon as you rev up that
engine, you'll become one with the wind!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Daaamn, this is awesome!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Wh-what? What's with that look? I'm passionate about bikes, okay?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
My pops is a huge fan of 'em, and he'd always let me ride on the
back.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
But I guess it doesn't really matter 'cause I can't buy it anyway. Just
like winning the Derby, it's not something I can easily get my hands
on.
choice_data_list: Let's get one when you win it.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Win what? You mean like, the Derby?!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Whoa, whoa, whoa. So I can make my dreams come true and get a sick ride? I like the way you think!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: It's a promise between us then! I feel like I can do anything with you!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Holy crap, I'm all fired up! I can't just stand still here... I'm gonna... I'm
gonna...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna charge straight down to the beach! I may not have my ride
yet... but my own two legs will do!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Raaaaargh!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Vodka sprints away at full speed, as I chase her with all my might... in
a taxi.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Whew, that felt good. It's nice runnin' on the road instead of the turf
from time to time.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
The ocean breeze feels so good... If this moment isn't the definition
of cool, then I don't know what is.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Trainer, this might sound a little strange, but... is there a
difference between being cool and being strong?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I've always aimed to be cool rather than strong. To me, being strong
is already a part of being cool.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Like, you know that time everyone laughed at me 'cause I put on airs
after I lost? It's been on my mind ever since.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
When it comes to being cool, my pops takes the cake. As for being
strong, well, that's my mom.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Curious, I listen to Vodka as she begins talking about her parents.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
My pops is a biker. He didn't participate in races, but we'd always go
out on rides together. Thanks to him, I got to go to a bunch of
different places.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Pops certainly had a way with words—he'd always tell me to live my
life on the edge, and let my tears dry in the wind!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
But my mom was the total opposite! She basically ran the whole
house, and would kick Pops's butt when he didn't have his act
together.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
When she ran, she was as fast as a motorbike! Dirt or pavement—she
was always a contender for first.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
They really are. But I always found myself following in my pops's
footsteps. Well, I guess it was bound to happen.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Maybe it would've been better to chase after my mom instead, but I
just couldn't see myself doing that.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Hey, do you think I've got it all wrong? Is it weird that my goal is to
become the coolest?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Really? Well, if you don't think it's weird, then maybe I'm on the right
track after all.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Sometimes I get dumb new ideas into my head, and they just bug me,
y'know? Anyway, it's getting late—let's head back.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: On the way back...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Pops used to take me on rides through streets like these. Just, like, to
the factory where he worked, or the local eateries and stuff.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: So it's not like we were goin' out for fun. But...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
No matter where he was heading, he'd always bring me along if I
wanted. All I had to do was ask.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Wha—! Don't say embarrassin' stuff like that! But... I guess you're
right, yeah.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
My pops shaped me into the person I am today. It's thanks to him that
I'm here now...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
(I can still hear it... The exhaust pipe of my pops's 250. The warmth
of the arm revving the engine...)

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: No doubt about it, this is my path forward. 'Cause...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: At the end of this road lies the coolest me there'll ever be!
